  • Soluções
    Destaques
    • Impulsione o desempenho do time

      Impulsione a jornada da pessoa colaboradora desde a atração de talentos.
    • Retenha os melhores talentos

      Crie um ciclo de engajamento que fortaleça o relacionamento e a retenção.
    • Alto volume de contratação

      Da atração ao contrato, encontre talentos em um processo automatizado.
    • Central de Carreiras

      A única solução que conecta recrutamento, desenvolvimento, performance e dados

Agendar Demonstração

Your vacancy filled faster and without barriers.

Simplify the process without login and with Whatsapp to increase the volume of qualified candidates by up to 40%. With the platform that is a benchmark in people management in Brazil.

Request demo ->

High turnover and low enrollment: is this your challenge?

  • 60%

    the candidates give up on the selection process if it's too long

    Source: Gupy Employability Report

  • 56%

    turnover in Brazil: One of the highest rates in the world

    Source: Robert Half-Caged

  • 60%

    of the companies interviewed face difficulties in hiring and retaining talent in operational sectors

    Source: FGV-IBRE | Uol

  • 66%

    the candidates say that a positive experience influenced their decision to accept a job offer

    Source: CareerPlug

If you want to simplify things, just choose Gupy's Quick Application

In just a few clicks, the candidate fills in the fields. A simple and easy experience, with a 98% satisfaction rate.
Request demo ->

Registration without login

Infinite steps? No need. Whether it's a few clicks on the form... Or in a direct WhatsApp conversation, you make it simple.

Talk to us

Get in touch and one of our
team will be ready to assist you.

Request demo ->

Attract more candidates with WhatsApp and audio responses

  • It's as simple and easy as a conversation.
  • Sign up in 60 seconds.
  • And the best part: talents can now also answer additional questions via audio.

Agility at every stage, from registration to candidate screening.

For recruiters, agility and scale.


  • Increase of +40% in the volume of applicants for operational vacancies;
  • Reduction of up to 95% in application times.

For those who sign up, it's easy.

  • Registration with just 4 fields: name, CPF, telephone and e-mail;
  • CV and LinkedIn optional;
  • Registration by WhatsApp.

More candidates,

now what?

  • Apply filters based on the additional questions defined in the job opening;
  • Analyze the candidate's profile with a simple and transparent experience;
  • Rely on intelligent sorting to help you make the right choice.

Change the game! You're always in control

  • Close vacancies faster.
  • Multiply the volume of applicants.
  • Make screening intelligent and uncomplicated, with all the potential that only Gupy has.
  • Reduce costs.
Request demo ->

Real stories, fast results

  • "I found the method used to make the quick application very effective."
    Danilo Daniel Del Favero Rural worker
  • "I liked the Quick Application. I found it very easy, without too much bureaucracy. Now I can get hired with a system that gives me everything I need to know in minutes, very good indeed."
    Kayo Jordan Moreira Barman

Without Gupy


  • 15 to 45 minutes to apply
  • High abandonment rate
  • Low volume of applicants

With Gupy's Rapid Application

  • Less than 1 minute
  • +40% of applicants
  • +98% satisfaction
  • Hired in a few days

Browse the platform and find out how to simplify your recruitment process

Gire o seu celular para a
horizontal para continuar a
demonstração.

Se a tela não girar automaticamente, verifique nas configurações do seu celular se a rotação está ativada.

Storylane

Storylane is a platform for creating and sharing interactive demos. Welcome to the future of interactive demos.

Candidatura Rápida

Saiba como fazer sua inscrição em poucos cliques, sem login e até pelo Wpp quando a empresa escolhe este modelo de candidatura

1/11
Made with  Storylane

Your talents are already on WhatsApp. What about your recruitment?

We simplify the path. You focus on the next hire.

Request a demo and see the transformation take place.

  • Selecione
  • Sou autônomo(a)
  • Estou procurando emprego / Sou candidato (a)
  • Selecione
  • Supervisor(a)
  • Business Partner
  • Selecione
  • Recrutamento e admissão digital mais ágil e fluido
  • Treinamento, engajamento e performance dos seus talentos
  • Selecione
  • Administração de Serviços
  • Bancário/Instituição Financeira

Só entraremos em contato com você para realizar a demo solicitada. Ao submeter seus dados, você concorda com a política de privacidade da Gupy.
